name: Pork Sausage Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the pork into a mixing bowl.
2. Add the salt, pepper, allspice, cloves, and ginger to the pork.
3. Stir well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Divide the mixture into 12 portions.
5. Roll each portion into a ball.
6. Flatten each ball into a patty.
7. Place a heavy 10-inch skillet over medium heat for 1 minute.
8. Arrange 6 sausage patties in the skillet.
9. Cook until golden brown, about 3 to 4 minutes on each side.
10. Remove the cooked patties from the skillet and place them on an ovenproof plate.
11. Cover the plate with foil.
12. Put the plate in a warm oven set to 200°F (93°C).
13. Cook the remaining 6 patties using the same steps as above.
YIELD: 12 patties
